reviews.comment:
La YPF del ACA, muy buen servicio. Siempre hay algo de espera pero vale la pena sobre todo si queres pagar con SERVICLUB o la app de YPF ya que siempre esta disponible, (lo que no pasa en todas las estaciones)

(Translated by Google)
The YPF station at ACA is very good. There's always a wait, but it's worth it, especially if you want to pay with SERVICLUB or the YPF app, since it's always available (which isn't the case at all stations).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bC1XRkZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio las dos veces que vine. Siempre 2 horas para atender y andan pocos surtidores. Como bajo la calidad del aca

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service both times I came. It always takes two hours to get service and there are only a few pumps. The quality of the service has dropped.

reviews.comment:
Como todo en peronia.... 15 surtidores, nunca todos abiertos... Consecuencia SIEMPRE esperas

(Translated by Google)
Like everything else in Peronia... 15 gas pumps, never all open... The consequence is that you ALWAYS wait.
